arts.ttl: West Ham chiefs not happy with one of Julen Lopetegui’s summer signings
arts.sum: West Ham United’s board have been left disappointed by one of Julen Lopetegui’s summer signings. The Hammers signed Luis Guilherme from Palmeiras in the summer for a reported £25 million fee. The 18-year-old winger has yet to feature for the Londoners in a competitive match, and according to club insider Sean Whetstone, via Hammers News, […] The post West Ham chiefs not happy with one of Julen Lopetegui’s summer signings appeared first on CaughtOffside.
